title: morphixia curta
side_effects: Morphixia curta can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea and vomiting due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can lead to skin irritation, rashes, and blistering in some individuals. In severe cases, ingesting even small amounts of the plant's leaves or stems can result in respiratory failure, seizures, and even coma. Improper handling and preparation of the plant can also lead to accidental poisoning, emphasizing the need for caution and expertise when handling Morphixia curta.
